title: daucus carota subsp. fontanesii
intro: Daucus carota subsp. fontanesii, also known as the wild carrot or French carrot, is a subspecies of the Daucus carota plant, a type of flowering plant in the parsley family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Daucus carota subsp. fontanesii include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
